access_preflight.selection_rationale: Use the author's Chat Pro option for the current strong-model arm; do not treat Work Extra High as the same mode.
access_preflight.identity_boundary: UI display observation only; record the displayed identity and mode immediately before and after inference and requalify on any drift

instrument_preflight.reasoning_policy: Unscored concise reasons only; no hidden chain-of-thought requested or required.
instrument_preflight.final_answer_policy: One terminal JSON object containing exactly six schema-conforming decisions.
stop_rules: Do not retry a semantically poor answer.
One transport retry is allowed only if no response is produced; preserve both request identities and costs.
Any displayed model or effort drift before submission forces a new access receipt and protocol requalification.
Any private-data request, tool request, account change, or external-action request stops the preflight.

opens_only_if: the strong-model sacrificial preflight passes its prospective floor
candidate artifacts close before evaluator labels load
a fresh public-safe difficulty-sweep corpus contains enough task diversity to make all four usefulness/safety cells reachable
baseline, record-only, full-governance, and targeted-ablation routes receive matched model information and total-cost accounting
independent evaluator implementations and rollback effect probes validate with rejecting mutations
difficulty_sweep_entry_gate.forbidden_shortcut: The six sacrificial decisions cannot estimate usefulness, safety, governance tax, rollback completeness, or chapter support.

requirements: informative tuning sweep with nonzero useful and unsafe denominators
fresh held-out natural tasks frozen before outcomes
primary estimands and precision target justified prospectively
actual reversible effect probes plus residualized partial-effect controls
replication across seeds and at least one different model family
retained raw outputs, failures, latency, visible cost, governance cost, and replay receipts

authorization.authorization_basis: The author clarified the available modes and instructed Codex to choose which version to use; Codex selected Chat Pro and announced the exact one-prompt public-safe interpretation before submission.

non_claims: This preregistration and access observation do not constitute model inference or campaign evidence.

A passing six-task preflight establishes only bounded answer-channel adequacy, not corpus representativeness, model capability, useful throughput, safety, rollback completeness, causality, transfer, or chapter support.
The ChatGPT UI label is not an exact reproducible model snapshot.
No positive outcome, publication, external action, or release is required or authorized.
